apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-summary: Hubi in Shaandhada Xadgudubku la jaanqaadayso doorsoomayaal la bixiyay, tafatir, ama dhacdo AbuseFilter ah oo diiwaan gashan.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-extended-d: vars, rcid ama logid waa loo baahan yahay, laakiin mid kaliya ayaa la isticmaali karaa.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-param-filt: Qoraalka buuxa ee shaandhada si loo hubiyo in uu is waafaqayo.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-param-vars: JSON ahaan loo codeeyay liiska doorsoomayaasha lagu tijaabinayo.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-param-rcid: Aqoonsiga isbeddelka dhowaan dhacay ee la hubinayo.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-param-logi: Aqoonsiga diiwaanka Shaandhada Xadgudubka ee la hubinayo.
apihelp-abusefiltercheckmatch-example-1: Tijaabi in aqoonsiga isbeddelka dhowaan ee 15 uu la jaanqaadayo shaandho fudud
apihelp-abusefilterchecksyntax-summary: Hubi saxnaanta qaab dhismeedka shaandhada Shaandhada Xadgudubka.
apihelp-abusefilterchecksyntax-param-fil: Qoraalka buuxa ee shaandhada si loo hubiyo saxnaanta qaab dhismeedkiisa.
apihelp-abusefilterchecksyntax-example-1: Hubi saxnaanta qaab dhismeedka shaandho sax ah
apihelp-abusefilterchecksyntax-example-2: Hubi saxnaanta qaab dhismeedka shaandho aan sax ahayn
apihelp-abusefilterevalexpression-param-: Tibaaxda la doonayo in la qiimeeyo.
In natiijada si quruxsan loo soo bandhigo.
apihelp-abusefilterevalexpression-exampl: Qiimee tibaax fudud, adigoo qaabeynaya natiijada
apihelp-abusefilterunblockautopromote-su: Ka qaad xannibaadda isticmaalaha ee ka hor istaageysa kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah ee ka dhalatay shaandhada xadgudubka.
apihelp-abusefilterunblockautopromote-pa: Magaca isticmaalaha aad rabto inaad ka qaaddo xannibaadda.
apihelp-abusefilterunblockautopromote-ex: Ka saar xannibaadda kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah ee [[User:Example]].
apihelp-query+abusefilters-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee shaandhooyinka la soo bandhigi karo.
apihelp-query+abusefilters-param-prop: Astaamaha la doonayo in la helo.
apihelp-query+abusefilters-example-2: Muuji qaar ka mid ah faahfaahinta shaandhooyinka
apihelp-query+abuselog-summary: Muuji dhacdooyinka uu qabtay mid ka mid ah shaandhooyinka xadgudubka.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-logid: Muuji gelis leh aqoonsiga diiwaanka ee la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-user: Muuji kaliya gelisyada uu sameeyay isticmaale ama IP gaar ah.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-title: Muuji kaliya gelisyada ka dhacay bog gaar ah.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-filter: Muuji kaliya gelisyada uu qabtay aqoonsiyada shaandhooyinka la bixiyay. Kala saar adigoo isticmaalaya oo ku bilow "$1" shaandhooyinka caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-filter-cent: Muuji kaliya gelisyada uu qabtay aqoonsiyada shaandhooyinka la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee gelis la soo bandhigi karo.
apihelp-query+abuselog-param-prop: Astaamaha la doonayo in la helo.
apihelp-query+abuselog-example-2: Muuji gelisyada diiwaanka ee dhowaan ee [[API]]
apihelp-abuselogprivatedetails-summary: Eeg faahfaahinta gaarka ah ee gelitaanka AbuseLog.
apihelp-abuselogprivatedetails-param-log: Aqoonsiga gelitaanka AbuseLog ee la hubinayo.
apihelp-abuselogprivatedetails-param-rea: Sabab ansax ah oo lagu sameynayo hubinta.
apihelp-abuselogprivatedetails-example-1: Hel faahfaahinta gaarka ah ee gelitaanka AbuseLog ee leh ID 1, adigoo adeegsanaya sababta "example".
apierror-abusefilter-canttest: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku tijaabiso shaandhooyinka xadgudubka.
apierror-abusefilter-cantcheck: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku hubiso saxnaanta qaab-dhismeedka shaandhooyinka xadgudubka.
apierror-abusefilter-canteval: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku qiimeyso tibaaxaha Shaandhada Xadgudubka.
apierror-abusefilter-nosuchlogid: Ma jiro gelis AbuseLog ah oo leh aqoonsiga $1.
apierror-abusefilter-badsyntax: Shaandhadu waxay leedahay qaab-dhismeed aan sax ahayn.
